note:
Zero squeeze setups again? You gotta be kidding me. The market is screaming neutrality right now, and if you think that means doing nothing, you're not paying attention. When the crowd sees a flatline, we see a coiling spring. And the tighter this thing coils, the bigger the eventual move. The question is: which way does it break? The market always tells us. Are we listening?  

This morning, futures are stuck in the mud. S&P 500 is chopping around flat, the Nasdaq’s giving up a tick, nothing dramatic. Dollar’s taking a breather, which tells me the risk-on crowd is still trying to find its footing. Meanwhile, bonds aren’t flinching, and crude’s been lifeless, refusing to pick a side. Across the board, there’s hesitation. But guess what? When the music stops and everyone realizes they’re still playing defense, that’s when we get paid. Risk is on. Full stop.  

Here’s your cheat code: when the usual suspects—your $NVDA, $MSFT, $AAPL—are stalling out, it’s the forgotten corners of the market where the action begins. Look at uranium: $UUUU, $UEC, $SMR—call it nuclear winter if you want, but they’re quietly putting in the kind of bases that make you double-take. $UUUU has already doubled for us, and it’s still hanging strong. **That’s leadership.** Then we’ve got crypto not rolling over despite months of sluggishness. $ETHA, $BLSH, $BMNR, $COIN—they’re the cockroaches of this market. They refuse to die, and if broader risk catches a bid, these names will be in the front of the convoy. Oh, and don’t sleep on $GME. The meme stock of all meme stocks is down but not out, holding a 50% run like a champ. Something’s bubbling under the surface here.  

On the portfolio front, everything’s still in play. Sure, we’ve taken half off on our big winners—$BTU, $MP, $COIN, $UAMY, $UMAC—but we’re still long and loving the ride. These aren’t just profit-taking trims; they’re capital redeployment opportunities. Got dry powder? Good. Because when this squeeze cycle resets, the WARM board will heat up fast. Until then, the laggards deserve another look. $SE, $LI, $U—all still actionable for you FOMO warriors out there. If you missed the party on the doubles, you’ve got no excuse this time.  

Today, the playbook is simple: watch the laggards, watch the base-builders, and keep an eye on the broader tape. 0/0 HOT setups won’t stay zero for long. When risk appetite shifts, it’s going to do it fast. Be ready. The bears? They’ve got nothing.
